handler.native_api: AcEdCommandStack::lookupGlobalCmd(...) read-only bounded lookup; execution is not invoked

module.command.lookup.summary: Search the command stack for a command; returns fn addr + flags + AcEdCommand*
module.command.lookup.notes: M04 catalog-only classification for this raw-command API is closed as hard-blocked: raw AutoCAD command dispatch is forbidden in fallback policy and never exposed to agents. Wave4X Pane2: Read-only command-stack lookup contract for bounded ARIADNE command names; never executes command strings.

module.command.remove_group.summary: Cleanup: remove a whole command group (usual kUnloadAppMsg step) or one command. Required before
module.command.remove_group.notes: Wave3 post-merge re-audit accepted hard block. SAFETY_FORBIDDEN: arbitrary command group removal mutates the host command stack; implemented probes only clean up their bounded ARIADNE_M08N group. Wave4X Pane2: Bounded ARIADNE_W4X_LOADER_DOC command-group cleanup only; arbitrary group removal is not exposed.

handler.native_api: acrxLoadModule(const ACHAR* moduleName, bool printit, bool asCmd=false)

module.load.summary: Programmatically load a .arx/module into the running host from C++ (peer to ARX/APPLOAD/arxload). The
module.load.notes: Wave3 post-merge re-audit accepted hard block. SAFETY_FORBIDDEN: acrxLoadModule loads external code into the AutoCAD host process and is not an agent-exposed operation. Wave4X Pane2: Read-only current Ariadne native module loaded-status detection; never loads external code.

module.load.acad_rx.summary: Per-directory ASCII file of ObjectARX module names auto-loaded at startup; honored by core (incl.
module.load.acad_rx.notes: Wave3 post-merge re-audit accepted hard block. SAFETY_FORBIDDEN: ARX demand/load mechanics execute host modules and mutate runtime loader state. Wave4X Pane2: Read-only acad.rx file presence/status detection; never mutates autoload files.

module.load.by_app.summary: Load by registered application name (demand-load registry key resolves the file).
module.load.by_app.notes: Wave3 post-merge re-audit accepted hard block. SAFETY_FORBIDDEN: application-driven module loading executes external code and mutates process loader state. Wave4X Pane2: Read-only registered-app load validation contract; never invokes load-by-app.

handler.native_api: Registry: HKLM\…\R<ver>\<prodkey>\Applications\<app> keys LOADER,DESCRIPTION,LOADCTRLS,MANAGED (+ optional command sub-keys)

module.load.demand_register.summary: Register a native module for demand loading so the host loads it automatically on
module.load.demand_register.citation: [SFDC How to autoload DLLs], [DOC DEMANDLOAD], [DOC acet-reg-machine-prodkey]
module.load.demand_register.notes: M08N-A3 hard-blocked by safety: no raw command/menu/tool execution or AutoCAD demand-load registry mutation is exposed from the agent surface. Wave4X Pane2: Demand-load registration plan validation for bounded Ariadne metadata; never writes registry keys.

handler.native_api: acrxUnloadModule(const ACHAR* moduleName, bool asCmd=false) / acrxUnloadApp(appName, asCmd)

module.unload.summary: Programmatically unload a module/app. Note: locked apps cannot be unloaded; ObjectARX apps cannot be
module.unload.notes: Wave3 post-merge re-audit accepted hard block. SAFETY_FORBIDDEN: acrxUnloadModule can unload host modules and destabilize the running process; it remains non-agent-exposed. Wave4X Pane2: Read-only unload safety/status contract for the current Ariadne module; never unloads modules.

doc.sendstring.summary: Queues a command string into a target document's command stream (cross-document automation).
doc.sendstring.notes: Wave3 integration safety re-audit rejected the Pane10 implementation: arbitrary SendStringToExecute command strings are not exposed to agents. Safe higher-level bespoke operations must be implemented as typed handlers instead.
doc.sendstring.blocked_reason: SAFETY_FORBIDDEN: doc.sendstring is a raw command surface because it queues arbitrary command strings into a document command stream; Wave4X keeps it non-agent-exposed and requires bespoke typed handlers instead.

module.entrypoint.define.notes: Wave3 post-merge re-audit accepted hard block. SDK_NOT_EXPOSED: entrypoint definition is a compile/link-time ARX macro/export contract, not a runtime SDK operation callable by the job dispatcher.
module.entrypoint.define.blocked_reason: SDK_NOT_EXPOSED: entrypoint definition is a compile/link macro/export contract, not a runtime job operation.

module.entrypoint.dispatch.summary: Raw AutoCAD↔module message pump. A switch(msg) that routes each AppMsgCode to its On_k* virtual.
module.entrypoint.dispatch.notes: Wave3 post-merge re-audit accepted hard block. HOST_UNAVAILABLE: entrypoint dispatch is host-owned by the AutoCAD loader via acrxEntryPoint and cannot be synthesized safely by the integration job dispatcher.
module.entrypoint.dispatch.blocked_reason: HOST_UNAVAILABLE: acrxEntryPoint dispatch is owned by the AutoCAD loader and cannot be synthesized by the job dispatcher.
